# section 1: iter(callable, sentinel)
[1, 2]
[1, 2, 3, 4, 5]
[]
# section 2: slice.indices(length)
(1, 5, 2)
(4, -1, -1)
(0, 5, 1)
(0, 7, 1)
(2, 10, 1)
(0, 5, 1)
(10, 0, -2)
(7, 10, 1)
(0, 7, 1)
ValueError: slice step cannot be zero
# section 3: functools.lru_cache _CacheInfo
2
5
None
5
CacheInfo
2 5 None 5
0 4 2 2
# section 4: lru_cache _CacheInfo equals tuple
True
